x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: cause_notes, fix_notes, and workaround are the structured fields Now Assist reads for problem summaries and KB article generation. High missing rates are critical gaps for AI summarization.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Make Cause Notes and Fix Notes mandatory on problem closure (exclude Cancelled and Duplicate close codes). Configure a closure information mandatory UI policy. Workaround is informational only — it is only required when a workaround was actively used.
